case_title: THE PHILLIPS HOTEL et al VS WORTHINGTON CASSANDRA DBA CITYWIDE CASE MGMT.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $150.00 FILED BY THE PHILLIPS HOTEL BOSSELL LEE(MANAGER) AS TO DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON CASSANDRA DBA CITYWIDE CASE MGMT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PHILLIPS HOTEL BOSSELL LEE(MANAGER) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON CASSANDRA DBA CITYWIDE CASE MGMT. PLTF STILL MAY SUE MR HILL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
